channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Musk’s $1.8 trillion SpaceX IPO could be ‘highly undesirable’ for some
item.description: SpaceX’s IPO could challenge pension funds as concerns grow over its valuation and governance structure under Musk.

item.title: US lawmakers press Israel to let cancer patients out of Gaza for treatment
item.description: Group of lawmakers call on Trump administration to facilitate medical evacuations out of Gaza amid dearth of services.

item.title: Man pleads guilty to slaying top Democrat and her husband in Minnesota
item.description: Murder of Melissa and Mark Hortman by man disguised as police officer prompted concerns about political violence in US.

item.title: Jimenez and Quinones net as Mexico beat South Africa in World Cup opener
item.description: World Cup 2026 cohosts Mexico open the tournament with 2-0 win against South Africa, who were reduced to nine men.

item.title: World Cup mania at Mexico’s Zocalo Square
item.description: Jubilant football fans at Mexico City’s Zocalo Square are ready for the World Cup Opener at the city’s centre.

item.title: What happened, and who performed at the World Cup 2026 opening ceremony?
item.description: Musical performances, colour, and fan excitement precede the World Cup's opening game in Mexico City.

item.title: How puppets are helping women and children in Gaza cope with trauma
item.description: A puppet show project in Gaza is using storytelling and creative workshops to help women and children process trauma.

item.title: Minister condemns ‘racist thuggery’ as violence returns to Northern Ireland
item.description: The return of unrest to the province, which suffered decades of sectarian violence, has provoked deep concern.

item.title: Israel releases Hamas co-founder after two years in detention
item.description: Israeli authorities released Hamas co-founder Hassan Yousef after more than two years in administrative detention.

item.title: Trump administration sanctions Cuba’s national oil company, blasts Castros
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio denounces Union Cuba-Petroleo as having 'unlawfully expropriated' US resources.

item.title: Mexico City dazzles as World Cup 2026 kicks off in style
item.description: Fireworks and global stars light up Mexico City's kickoff of the 2026 World Cup at a revamped Azteca Stadium.

item.title: Trump to pick US attorney Jay Clayton for director of national intelligence
item.description: Nomination comes amid pushback over Donald Trump's selection of Bill Pulte as acting director of the agency.

item.title: Israel deports French journalist accused of supporting Hamas
item.description: Isreal suppressed coverage of its war on Gaza, banning international press and killing hundreds of local journalists.

item.title: China bars Philippines defence chief as South China Sea spat sails onwards
item.description: Chinese individuals and organisations are also banned from doing business with Gilberto Teodoro and his family.

item.title: How a Kushner-linked resort sparked protests across Albania
item.description: A luxury resort linked to Donald Trump’s son-in-law Jared Kushner has sparked some of Albania's biggest protests.

item.title: What is the Amal Movement, Lebanon’s other Shia party?
item.description: As Hezbollah's future is unclear, what role can Amal, Lebanon's other major Shia party, play?

item.title: Jose Mourinho named Real Madrid coach on three-year deal
item.description: Mourinho returns to La Liga giants after 13 years following Florentino Perez's re-election as club president.

item.title: Musk’s Grok accused of violating Canadian privacy laws on deepfakes
item.description: Privacy watchdog finds xAI's Grok lacks safeguards for sexualised deepfake image sharing, amid growing global scrutiny.

item.title: Israeli government mulling huge funding to expand West Bank settlement: NGO
item.description: The proposal, if passed, would mark one of the largest expansions of illegal Israeli settlements in decades.

item.title: Toronto police officer shot while investigating attack on US consulate
item.description: Police say one suspect still at large after constable fatally shot during search warrant linked to consulate attack.

item.title: Two sentenced to death in Bangkok bombing
item.description: Two men were sentenced to death in the 2015 Thai Erawan shrine bombing that killed 20 people and wounded more than 100.

item.title: Pope Leo tells migrants: ‘I bow before your dignity’
item.description: Pope Leo met with migrants and NGOs at a port in Spain’s Canary Islands dubbed the ‘dock of shame’.

item.title: Drone strikes on central Sudanese city kill up to 23: NGO
item.description: Local rights group Emergency Lawyers blamed the attack on the RSF, which did not immediately claim responsibility.

item.title: Property deeds no protection for Palestinians as settler violence spreads
item.description: Israeli settlers follow Palestinian Bedouins across the West Bank, chasing them from their land.

item.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
item.description: Global growth forecast cut to 2.5 percent due to surging energy prices, inflation and borrowing costs.
